home.title: Codex Monitor
home.subtitle: Orchestrate agents across your local projects.
home.noAgentActivitySubtitle: Start a thread to see the latest responses here.
home.noUsageDataSubtitle: Run a Codex session to start tracking local usage.

display.title: Display & Sound
display.subtitle: Tune visuals and audio alerts to your preferences.
display.displaySubsectionSubtitle: Adjust how the window renders backgrounds and effects.
display.showRemainingLimitsSubtitle: Display what is left instead of what is used.
display.showFilePathSubtitle: Display the parent path next to file links in messages.
display.splitChatDiff: Split chat and diff center panes
display.splitChatDiffSubtitle: Show chat and diff side by side instead of swapping between them.
display.autoGenerateTitleSubtitle: Generate a short title from your first message (uses extra tokens).
display.chatSubsectionSubtitle: Control how much conversation history is retained per thread.
display.unlimitedHistorySubtitle: Keep full thread history in memory (may impact performance).
display.scrollbackHelp: Higher values keep more history but may increase memory usage. Use "Sync from server" on a thread to re-fetch older messages.
display.scrollbackRange: Range: {{min}}–{{max}}. Counts messages, tool calls, and other conversation items.
display.reduceTransparencySubtitle: Use solid surfaces instead of glass.
display.uiFontHelp: Applies to all UI text. Leave empty to use the default system font stack.
display.codeFontHelp: Applies to git diffs and other mono-spaced readouts.
display.codeFontSizeHelp: Adjusts code and diff text size.
display.notificationSoundsSubtitle: Play a sound when a long-running agent finishes while the window is unfocused.
display.systemNotificationsSubtitle: Show a system notification when a long-running agent finishes while the window is unfocused.
display.subagentNotificationsSubtitle: Include spawned sub-agent threads in system notifications.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: App version, build metadata, and update controls.
about.autoCheckUpdatesSubtitle: When enabled, CodexMonitor checks for new app versions on launch.
about.updatesUnavailable: Updates are unavailable in this runtime.
about.latestVersion: You are on the latest version.
about.postUpdateWhatIsNew: Updated successfully. Here is what is new:
about.postUpdateFallback: Updated to v{{version}}. Release notes could not be loaded.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Group related workspaces and reorder projects within each group.
projects.groupsSubtitle: Create group labels for related repositories.
projects.projectsSubtitle: Assign projects to groups and adjust their order.

git.title: Git
git.subtitle: Manage how diffs are loaded in the Git sidebar.
git.ignoreWhitespaceSubtitle: Hides whitespace-only changes in local and commit diffs.
git.commitMessagePromptHelp: Used when generating commit messages. Include
git.commitMessageModelHelp: The model used when generating commit messages. Leave on default to use the workspace model.

composer.title: Composer
composer.subtitle: Control helpers and formatting behavior inside the message editor.
composer.steerUnavailableTooltip: Steer is unavailable in the current Codex config.
composer.followUpBehaviorHelp: Choose the default while a run is active. Press {{shortcut}} to send the opposite behavior for one message.
composer.followUpHintSubtitle: Displays queue/steer shortcut guidance above the composer.
composer.steerUnavailableHelp: Steer is unavailable in the current Codex config. Follow-ups will queue.
composer.presetsSubtitle: Choose a starting point and fine-tune the toggles below.
composer.presetHelp: Presets update the toggles below. Customize any setting after selecting.
composer.expandOnSpaceSubtitle: Typing ``` then Space inserts a fenced block.
composer.expandOnEnterSubtitle: Use Enter to expand ``` lines when enabled.
composer.supportLanguageTagsSubtitle: Allows ```lang + Space to include a language.
composer.wrapSelectionSubtitle: Wraps selected text when creating a fence.
composer.copyWithoutFencesSubtitle: When enabled, Copy is plain text. Hold {{modifier}} to include ``` fences.
composer.autoWrapMultilineSubtitle: Wraps multi-line paste inside a fenced block.
composer.autoWrapCodeLikeSubtitle: Wraps long single-line code snippets on paste.
composer.continueListsSubtitle: Continues numbered and bulleted lists when the line has content.

environments.title: Environments
environments.subtitle: Configure per-project setup scripts and worktree locations.
environments.setupScriptHelp: Runs once in a dedicated terminal after each new worktree is created.
environments.copyUnavailableMessage: Clipboard access is unavailable in this environment. Copy the script manually instead.
environments.copyWriteFailedMessage: Could not write to the clipboard. Copy the script manually instead.
environments.worktreesFolderHelp: Custom location for this project's worktrees. Leave empty to use the global root or the built-in default.
environments.globalWorktreesRootHelp: Default location for new worktrees when a project does not override it. Each project gets its own subfolder under this root.

openApps.title: Open in
openApps.subtitle: Customize the Open in menu shown in the title bar and file previews.
openApps.label: Label
openApps.footerPrefix: Commands receive the selected path as the final argument.
openApps.footerMac: Apps open via `open -a` with optional args.
openApps.footerOther: Apps run as an executable with optional args.

dictation.title: Dictation
dictation.subtitle: Enable microphone dictation with on-device transcription.
dictation.enableSubtitle: Downloads the selected Whisper model on first use.
dictation.preferredLanguageHelp: Auto-detect stays on; this nudges the decoder toward your preference.
dictation.holdKeyHelp: Hold the key to start dictation, release to stop and process.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Manage stable and experimental Codex features.
features.personalitySubtitle: Choose Codex communication style (writes top-level personality in config.toml).
features.pauseQueuedMessages: Pause queued messages when a response is required
features.pauseQueuedMessagesSubtitle: Keep queued messages paused while Codex is waiting for plan accept/changes or your answers.
features.noStableFeatures: No stable feature flags returned by Codex.
features.noExperimentalFeatures: No preview or under-development feature flags returned by Codex.
features.connectWorkspace: Connect a workspace to load Codex feature flags.
features.removedFeature: Legacy feature flag kept for backward compatibility.

fallbacks.undo: Create a ghost commit at each turn.
fallbacks.unified_exec: Use the single unified PTY-backed exec tool.
fallbacks.js_repl: Enable JavaScript REPL tools backed by a persistent Node kernel.
fallbacks.js_repl_tools_only: Only expose js_repl tools directly to the model.
fallbacks.search_tool: Removed legacy search flag kept for backward compatibility.
fallbacks.runtime_metrics: Enable runtime metrics snapshots via a manual reader.
fallbacks.sqlite: Persist rollout metadata to a local SQLite database.
fallbacks.memory_tool: Enable startup memory extraction and memory consolidation.
fallbacks.child_agents_md: Append additional AGENTS.md guidance to user instructions.
fallbacks.use_linux_sandbox_bwrap: Use the bubblewrap-based Linux sandbox pipeline.
fallbacks.request_rule: Allow approval requests and exec rule proposals.
fallbacks.experimental_windows_sandbox: Removed Windows sandbox flag kept for backward compatibility.
fallbacks.elevated_windows_sandbox: Removed elevated Windows sandbox flag kept for backward compatibility.
fallbacks.enable_request_compression: Compress streaming request bodies sent to codex-backend.
fallbacks.apps: Use a connected ChatGPT App using "$". Install Apps via /apps command. Restart Codex after enabling.
fallbacks.apps_mcp_gateway: Route Apps MCP calls through the configured gateway.
fallbacks.skill_mcp_dependency_install: Allow prompting and installing missing MCP dependencies.
fallbacks.skill_env_var_dependency_prompt: Prompt for missing skill environment variable dependencies.
fallbacks.steer: Enable turn steering capability when supported by Codex.
fallbacks.responses_websockets: Use Responses API WebSocket transport for OpenAI by default.
fallbacks.responses_websockets_v2: Enable Responses API WebSocket v2 mode.

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.subtitle: Customize keyboard shortcuts for file actions, composer, panels, and navigation.
shortcuts.filterHelp: Filter by section name, action, or default shortcut.
shortcuts.pressShortcutWithDefault: Press a new shortcut while focused. Default: {{shortcut}}
shortcuts.fileSubtitle: Create agents and worktrees from the keyboard.
shortcuts.composerSubtitle: Cycle between model, access, reasoning, and collaboration modes.

agents.title: Agents
agents.subtitle: Configure multi-agent mode, limits, and custom agent roles.
agents.builtInRoles: Built-in roles from Codex are still available: default, explorer, and worker.
agents.maxThreadsSubtitle: Maximum open agent threads. Valid range: 1–12. Changes save immediately.
agents.maxDepthSubtitle: Maximum nested spawn depth. Valid range: 1–4. Changes save immediately.
agents.createAgentSubtitle: Add a custom role under [agents.<name>] and create its config file.
agents.name: Name
agents.generateWithAi: Generate description and developer instructions with AI
agents.loadingModelMetadata: Loading workspace model metadata. Using fallback model defaults for now.
agents.usingFallbackModels: Using fallback model defaults until workspace model metadata is available.
agents.configuredAgentsSubtitle: Manage custom roles and their per-agent config files.
agents.deleteAgentPrompt: Delete agent and managed config file?
agents.renameManagedConfig: Rename managed config file when agent name changes

codex.title: Codex
codex.subtitle: Configure the Codex CLI used by CodexMonitor and validate the install.
codex.defaultPathHelp: Leave empty to use the system PATH resolution.
codex.defaultArgsHelp: Extra flags passed before app-server. Use quotes for values with spaces.
codex.sharedServerHelp: These settings apply to the shared Codex app-server used across all connected workspaces.
codex.perThreadOverrideHelp: Per-thread override processing ignores unsupported flags such as model, approval, sandbox, full-auto, oss, local-provider, and no-alt-screen overrides.
codex.addWorkspaceForModels: Add a workspace to load available models.
codex.loadingModels: Loading models from the first workspace…
codex.modelSubtitle: Sourced from the first workspace and used when there is no thread-specific override.
codex.reasoningEffortSubtitle: Available options depend on the selected model.
codex.reasoningEffortUnsupported: The selected model does not expose reasoning effort options.
codex.accessModeSubtitle: Used when there is no thread-specific override.
codex.reviewModeHelp: Choose whether /review runs in the current thread or a detached review thread.
codex.globalAgentsPlaceholder: Add global instructions for Codex agents…

server.title: Server
server.mobileSubtitle: Configure TCP host/token from your desktop setup, then run a connection test.
server.desktopSubtitle: Configure how CodexMonitor exposes TCP backend access for mobile and remote clients. Desktop usage remains local unless you explicitly connect through remote mode.
server.mobileDaemonErrorState: Mobile daemon is in an error state.
server.backendModeHelp: Local keeps desktop requests in-process. Remote routes desktop requests through the same TCP transport path used by mobile clients.
server.switchActiveRemoteHelp: Switch the active remote here. The fields below edit the active entry.
server.keepDaemonRunning: Keep daemon running after app closes
server.keepDaemonRunningSubtitle: If disabled, CodexMonitor stops managed TCP daemon processes before exit.
server.mobileRemoteBackendHelp: Use the Tailscale host from your desktop CodexMonitor app (Server section), for example `macbook.your-tailnet.ts.net:4732`.
server.desktopRemoteBackendHelp: This host/token is used by mobile clients and desktop remote-mode testing.
server.connectionTestHelp: Make sure your desktop app daemon is running and reachable on Tailscale, then retry this test.
server.mobileAccessDaemonHelp: Start this daemon before connecting from iOS. It uses your current token and listens on 0.0.0.0:<port>, matching your configured host port.
server.installTailscaleHelp: Install Tailscale on both desktop and iOS to continue.
server.commandTemplateHelp: Command template (manual fallback) for starting the daemon:
server.remoteBackendTokenEmpty: Remote backend token is empty. Set one before exposing daemon access.
server.mobileFooterHelp: Use your own infrastructure only. On iOS, get the Tailscale hostname and token from your desktop CodexMonitor setup.
server.desktopFooterHelp: Mobile access should stay scoped to your own infrastructure (tailnet). CodexMonitor does not provide hosted backend services.
server.removeRemoteMessage: Remove {{name}} from saved remotes? This only removes the profile from this device.

mobileSetup.title: Connect to your desktop backend
mobileSetup.subtitle: Complete this setup before using the app. Use the same connection details configured in your desktop CodexMonitor server settings.
mobileSetup.hint: Use the Tailscale host from desktop Server settings and keep the desktop daemon running.
mobileSetup.defaultMessage: Enter your desktop Tailscale host and token, then run Connect & test.
mobileSetup.connected: Connected. {{count}} workspace available from your desktop backend.
mobileSetup.connected_plural: Connected. {{count}} workspaces available from your desktop backend.
mobileSetup.saveFailed: Unable to save remote backend settings.
mobileSetup.connectFailed: Unable to connect to remote backend.

files.noModifiedFilesMatchFilter: No modified files match your filter.

workspaceHome.threadsFromSidebarAppearHere: Threads from the sidebar will appear here.

appHeader.openWorktreeInTerminal: Open this worktree in your terminal.

composerFollowUp.unavailableCopy: Default: {{queueLabel}} ({{steerLabel}} unavailable). Both Enter and {{shortcut}} will {{queueVerb}} this message.

messages.sendPromptToAgent: Send a prompt to the agent.
messages.sendPromptToStartAgent: Send a prompt to start a new agent.
messages.nextMessageFetchIn: New message will be fetched in {{seconds}} seconds

gitPanel.remoteAheadPullFirst: Remote is ahead. Pull first, or use Sync.
gitPanel.syncHelp: Pull latest changes and push your local commits
gitPanel.workspaceNotGitRepository: This workspace isn't a Git repository yet.
gitPanel.chooseRepoForWorkspace: Choose a repo for this workspace.
gitPanel.remoteHasNewCommitsSyncBeforeRetrying: Remote has new commits. Sync (pull then push) before retrying.
gitPanel.noAgentEditsYet: No agent edits in this thread yet.

aboutView.title: Codex Monitor
aboutView.tagline: Monitor the situation of your Codex agents
aboutView.footer: Made with love by Codex & Dimillian

reviewPrompt.placeholder: Focus on correctness, edge cases, and missing tests.

worktreePrompt.title: New worktree agent
worktreePrompt.subtitle: Create a worktree under "{{workspace}}".
worktreePrompt.setupScriptHint: Stored on the project (Settings → Environments) and runs once in a dedicated terminal after each new worktree is created.

planReady.title: Plan ready
planReady.description: Start building from this plan, or describe changes to the plan.
planReady.placeholder: Describe what you want to change in the plan...
planReady.notificationBody: Plan is ready. Open CodexMonitor to respond.
